name: Chicago Motor Bus Co

fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee Richton Park operator with no verifiable school district contracts; likely a small medicar/livery or ad-hoc SPED van shop. Below Summit's tuck-in threshold and overshadowed by Cook-Illinois in the same geography.
